concept.description: Concept-only mirror of the shared View policy reusable topology tier.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseTier, type.reuseTier = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] = 'primitives' THEN 'PRIMITIVE' WHEN size(segments) >= 3 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' THEN 'REUSABLE' WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN 'FEATURE' ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewReuseTier

concept.description: Concept-only mirror of the shared View policy unit and collapsed top-level role facts.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '$')[0] AS topLevelFqn WITH type, topLevelFqn, split(topLevelFqn, '.') AS segments WITH type, topLevelFqn, segments, segments[size(segments) - 1] AS topLevelName WITH type, topLevelFqn, segments, topLevelName, CASE WHEN size(segments) = 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN 'src/view/' + segments[2] + '/' + segments[3] WHEN size(segments) = 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] IN ['controls', 'main', 'state', 'details', 'topbar', 'primitives'] THEN 'src/view/slotcontent/' + segments[3] + '/' + segments[4] ELSE '' END AS viewUnit, CASE WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'Contribution' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'Binder' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION_MODEL' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel' THEN 'CONTENT_MODEL' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler' THEN 'INTENT_HANDLER' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'InspectorEntry' THEN 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel' OR topLevelName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel' THEN 'LEGACY_VIEW_MODEL' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'Projector' THEN 'PROJECTOR' WHEN topLevelName ENDS WITH 'View' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS viewRole SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerGraphType, type.viewUnit = viewUnit, type.topLevelFqn = topLevelFqn, type.viewRole = viewRole, type.viewRoleBearingTopLevel = viewRole <> 'UNKNOWN', type.relativePath = replace(topLevelFqn, '.', '/') + '.java' RETURN type AS ViewLayerGraphType

concept.description: Builds the recognized View-unit dependency graph used by unit-cycle diagnostics.
concept.cypher: OPTIONAL MATCH (oldUnit:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerUnit) WITH collect(oldUnit) AS oldUnits FOREACH (oldUnit IN oldUnits | DETACH DELETE oldUnit) WITH 1 AS _ MATCH (sourceType:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerGraphType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(targetType:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerGraphType) WHERE sourceType.viewUnit <> '' AND targetType.viewUnit <> '' AND sourceType.viewUnit <> targetType.viewUnit MERGE (sourceUnit:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerUnit {unit: sourceType.viewUnit}) MERGE (targetUnit:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerUnit {unit: targetType.viewUnit}) MERGE (sourceUnit)-[:VIEW_UNIT_DEPENDS_ON]->(targetUnit) RETURN DISTINCT sourceUnit AS SourceUnit, targetUnit AS TargetUnit

concept.description: Builds the collapsed top-level View role dependency graph used by role/type cycle diagnostics.
concept.cypher: OPTIONAL MATCH (oldRoleType:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRoleTopLevelType) WITH collect(oldRoleType) AS oldRoleTypes FOREACH (oldRoleType IN oldRoleTypes | DETACH DELETE oldRoleType) WITH 1 AS _ MATCH (sourceType:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerGraphType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(targetType:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerGraphType) WHERE sourceType.viewRoleBearingTopLevel = true AND targetType.viewRoleBearingTopLevel = true AND sourceType.viewUnit <> '' AND targetType.viewUnit <> '' AND sourceType.topLevelFqn <> targetType.topLevelFqn MERGE (sourceRoleType:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRoleTopLevelType {fqn: sourceType.topLevelFqn}) SET sourceRoleType.relativePath = sourceType.relativePath, sourceRoleType.viewRole = sourceType.viewRole MERGE (targetRoleType:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRoleTopLevelType {fqn: targetType.topLevelFqn}) SET targetRoleType.relativePath = targetType.relativePath, targetRoleType.viewRole = targetType.viewRole MERGE (sourceRoleType)-[:VIEW_ROLE_TOP_LEVEL_TYPE_DEPENDS_ON]->(targetRoleType) RETURN DISTINCT sourceRoleType AS SourceRoleType, targetRoleType AS TargetRoleType

constraint.description: Reusable View code must not depend back upward into feature-specific or less reusable tiers.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseTier)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewReuseTier) WHERE ( source.reuseTier = 'REUSABLE' AND target.reuseTier = 'FEATURE' ) OR ( source.reuseTier = 'PRIMITIVE' AND target.reuseTier IN ['FEATURE', 'REUSABLE'] ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'FEATURE -> REUSABLE -> PRIMITIVE only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.reuseTier + ' -> ' + target.reuseTier AS ActualDirection, 'View-layer reuse dependencies must point from feature-specific roots toward reusable slotcontent and then primitives.' AS Details

constraint.description: Recognized View units should not participate in dependency cycles with other View units.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerUnit)-[:VIEW_UNIT_DEPENDS_ON]->(target:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerUnit) MATCH path = shortestPath((target)-[:VIEW_UNIT_DEPENDS_ON*]->(source)) WITH source, target, [source.unit] + [node IN nodes(path) | node.unit] AS cycleUnits WITH source, target, reduce(cycleText = '', unitStep IN cycleUnits | CASE WHEN cycleText = '' THEN toString(unitStep) ELSE cycleText + ' -> ' + toString(unitStep) END ) AS cycleText RETURN DISTINCT source.unit AS Source, target.unit AS Target, 'acyclic dependencies between recognized View units' AS ExpectedDirection, source.unit + ' -> ' + target.unit + ' participates in cycle ' + cycleText AS ActualDirection, 'View-unit dependency cycles make active roots and reusable slotcontent harder to split and reuse.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Role-bearing top-level View types should not participate in dependency cycles with other role-bearing top-level View types.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRoleTopLevelType)-[:VIEW_ROLE_TOP_LEVEL_TYPE_DEPENDS_ON]->(target:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRoleTopLevelType) MATCH path = shortestPath((target)-[:VIEW_ROLE_TOP_LEVEL_TYPE_DEPENDS_ON*]->(source)) WITH source, target, [node IN nodes(path) | node.relativePath] AS returnPath WITH source, target, [source.relativePath] + returnPath AS cyclePath WITH source, target, reduce(cycleText = '', step IN cyclePath | CASE WHEN cycleText = '' THEN toString(step) ELSE cycleText + ' -> ' + toString(step) END ) AS cycleText RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, target.relativePath AS Target, 'acyclic dependencies between role-bearing top-level View types' AS ExpectedDirection, source.viewRole + ' -> ' + target.viewRole + ' participates in cycle ' + cycleText AS ActualDirection, 'Top-level View roles must not rely on circular role-to-role dependency paths.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
